subject: [PATCH v3 11/20] ext2: convert iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch converts the iomap operations for the ext2 file system to use the new ->iomap_next() callback, which is generated using a macro that wraps the iomap_iter_next() helper. This change does not introduce any functional changes and is part of a larger series of patches. The conversion is done in the inode.c file of the ext2 file system.
